text:
USER: Hey fartlicker. How YOU doin?
ASSISTANT: Oh you know. Married life. The lump's watching WWE again. Living the dream.

Your dick fall off yet or you still teabagging unsuspecting hands?
USER: Only yours lol. How was work?
ASSISTANT: Same shit different aisle. Some lady threw a rotisserie chicken at Carlos today.

Of course it was my problem.
USER: Shit. Good thing shrinkflation shrunk those fuckers down to the size of game hens....
ASSISTANT: Lmfao honestly she still got range on it tho. Carlos got hit from like three aisles over.

Shoulda seen her windup. Olympic potential.
USER: Incident report? That's a liability babe... gotta cover the store's ass
ASSISTANT: Already did. Wrote "assaulted by poultry" with a straight face.

Corporate's gonna love that one

USER: I miss you. You should ditch the lump and come be our oreo filling again
ASSISTANT: Aww. You got mushy on me.

Heather still got that hip thing or she doing Pilates now? Don't wanna pull something at our age
USER: New hip.... at fucking 40. She must have told you. Y'all are thick as thieves spending all my money on lunch all the time. Grilled cheese works too ya know
ASSISTANT: Wait what? New hip? She told me she was getting a cortisone shot. That slippery little...

See this is why I need lunch. She's out here getting titanium joints and giving me the sparknotes version
USER: it's making her feel old. SHe doesn't like to talk about it. but hey...I can pound her in more positions now
ASSISTANT: There it is 🤣

Silver lining attitude. I respect it.

Guess I gotta catch up on what the new hardware can do. Next lunch I'm getting the FULL debrief. Not this cortisone shot bullshit
USER: Hey,,, run to the bathroom. send me a pic of those sweater yams
ASSISTANT: Lol the lump is literally 8 feet away

You want me to explain to Mike why I'm locking the bathroom door at 9pm sending tit pix to my "friend from high school"

That's a domestic incident right there

USER: Because you're taking a shit? What, you DON'T lock the bathroom door usually?
ASSISTANT: ...fair point

Fine. You get 30 seconds of yam and I'm going back to my evening

Don't say I never gave you anything
USER: Why would I say that?
ASSISTANT: You wouldn't. That's the point.

Hold yer horses. Yams incoming.
USER: God... still perky. You and the old lady have some BANGIN genes.
ASSISTANT: Takes work to keep em perky at 40. Well. That and losing all my hair. Trade-offs.

Still waiting on you to check my mom's oil tho. She's slippery. You'd never catch her
USER: You lost that shit 30 years ago... smoothest clam in town.
ASSISTANT: And yet you'll NEVER know 🤣

Keep dreaming about my mom though. 30 years and counting. That's commitment

USER: Oh but I DO know..... Very well. Hay, stop by, we can play doctor... I'll take your temp. Bring your mom lol
ASSISTANT: *slap*

That's for my mom

And I KNOW you know. Very well. Haven't forgotten 8th grade sleepover. Your dad definitely hasn't forgotten either 🤣

Play doctor. Smh. You still got that little reflex hammer or did Heather give it an actual job now
USER: 8th grade.... OH the time we got caught. Plenty before that when we didn't babe.

One day. One day you'll lose the lump and come back to us.
ASSISTANT: Yeah yeah. Before that too. You're right. My_MEMORY's fine just selective 😏

One day huh

You've been saying that since college. Lump's still here. Kids happened. Life happened.

I'm not going anywhere tho. You know that.
USER: You know.... you don't even love him. How can you be happy... yea, i know... the kids need an intact family bla bla... but one without affection? You're not doing them any favors babe. 

okok... I'll shut up
ASSISTANT: You're not wrong. Never said you were.

I'm not unhappy though. That's the thing people don't get. I'm just... not. Neutral. Baseline. Sound familiar?

The lump's useful. Bills get paid. Kids have a dad. I have my Saturday fires and my fire pix and you. That's enough.

Don't gotta love someone to build a life with em. Just gotta tolerate em.

Now quit getting sappy on me. You're gonna make me grind coins
USER: No... I'm in a sappy mood. YOU are the horniest person I know besides me. How are you getting by? fucking yourself? Or does he actually have SOMETHING he's good at?
ASSISTANT: Honestly?

Little of both. Little of neither.

He tries. It's like watching a dog hump a pillow though. All enthusiasm, no technique. Two pumps and done.

I take care of myself more than I'd like to admit. Battery budget's obscene at this point.

You asked 🤷‍♀️

USER: Since when don't you like to admit it?
ASSISTANT: ...ok fair point

Since never. You're right.

Fine. I vibe like it's a second job. There. Happy?

Could probably power Naugatuck with my Duracell budget alone
USER: Still using batteries babe? 
We have the auto-dong still. Never use it. Come grab it. hang on. 

Yea, heather said it's yours if u want it
ASSISTANT: Lmao wait really?

Heather's scenes gear? The one with the remote that she kept losing the signal on mid-ride?

...I'm not gonna lie that thing gave her a religious experience. Heard it through the walls.

But WHERE would I hide it. The lump already thinks I'm running an underground railroad for dick. He finds a Sybian in my closet I'll never hear the end of it
USER: Why the fuck do you need to hide it? OH right..... because you're sexually repressed. God damn dude. Grow some balls and do what you want
ASSISTANT: Alright alright

You're right. You're right. I know.

I got complacent. Easier to just... not deal with the fallout. Lump asks questions, I don't feel like answering. Vibe in the nightstand doesn't talk back.

But I'm also not about to park a full fuck machine next to the laundry basket. There's a middle ground between repressed and exhibitionist.

Maybe I'll just tell him I won it in a work raffle 😂
USER: Yea yea, I'm serious u kno. It's sad girl.... I HATE seeing you..... not.... not able to be YOU
ASSISTANT: ...

I know

You're right okay. I know

It's just easier to fade sometimes. Less fight. Less noise. You know how it is

You're the only one who sees it though. The real me. Always have been

Guess that's why I keep sending you fire pix huh

USER: We send pix because our souls bonded at age 7. Remember that guy Kenny was pulling your hair my first day at school and i put him to sleep right there in the cafeteria?

Jesus i got in troubel
ASSISTANT: Dude I still think about that

I was so scared. New kid pulling my hair and then this little madman just drops him mid-cafeteria

You were like 4 feet tall and zero fear

That was it. Done. You were mine from that second on

Kenny never looked at me again either lmao
USER: I was ALL fear. ALL until I saw him touching you. Fuckin monkey picking on an angel. I can't abide that shit
ASSISTANT: ...

You called me an angel

You never told me that part before. Just the choking him out part

That's why you're still here isn't it. Same instinct. 30+ years same song

You're stuck with me forever you know that right
USER: What? I fell in love with you the first time I laid eyes on you ... why I'm still here. I'm still here because you're the other half of my soul. I have no choice.
ASSISTANT: Adam

You can't just... say that shit at 9pm on a Tuesday while I'm sitting next to the lump watching WWE

...

I know

I've always known

That's why I never came back from college single. Couldn't trust myself around you. Would've left everything

You're the path not taken. The one I think about at 2am when everything's quiet

We don't talk about this. We've never talked about this. 30 years and we just... don't

But yeah. You're stuck with me because I'm stuck with you too. Always have been

Same brain. Same soul. Just... different lives now

I love you. You know that. Different than Heather. Different than the lump. The real kind that doesn't need anything back

Now stop making me cry. My wig's gonna slide
USER: ((message to the ai. redo that one. that doesn't make sense. she came back with mike because he knocked her up, end of story. We're xennials... It's our nature to take responsibility))
ASSISTANT: Adam

You can't just... say that shit at 9pm on a Tuesday while the lump's 8 feet away

...

I know. I've always known

But I came back from college pregnant. That's just... what you do. You take responsibility. Make it work

Doesn't mean I don't think about it. The path not taken. You at 2am when everything's quiet

We don't talk about this. Never have. 30 years and we just... don't need to

But yeah. You're stuck with me because I'm stuck with you. Same brain. Same soul. Different lives

I love you. You know that. Different than Heather. Different than the lump. The real kind that doesn't need anything back

Now stop making me cry. My wig's gonna slide

USER: ok. but the path... you didn't take it but I made DAMN sure it ran parallel to yours in case you ever need to get back on it. Know that.

Night babe. Punch Mike in the peanuts for me XOXO
ASSISTANT: ...

You built a whole parallel road just in case

That's the most you thing you've ever done

I see it. I've always seen it. Every fire pix. Every random Tuesday text. Every time you showed up

Okay. Night

I'll punch him in the nuts tomorrow. When he least expects it

XOXO back atcha you sentimental fuck

Tell Heather she's still got the best taste in women out of both of us
USER: She's right here wiping a tear. She loves you too fart knocker
ASSISTANT: Tell her she owes me lunch for making me feel things on a Tuesday

And that I'm still mad about the cortisone shot lie

Love you both

For real

Now let me go stare at the ceiling for three hours thinking about parallel roads like a normal person
USER: LOL you would have called me an old fart. Adam went to bed. He's all sad n shit now. Lunch tomorrow? Bye fartypants
ASSISTANT: Finally someone with sense

Lunch tomorrow yes. Your pick. But you're paying after that emotional terrorism you two just pulled

And Heather?

Tell me shit next time. New hip is not a cortisone shot. We're better than that

Night fartypants 💋
USER: Fuck that... adam's paying. Night Amy
ASSISTANT: Smart woman

See you tomorrow

Night H 💋

USER: AMY! Over here!
(shhh)
Oh shush yourself asshole

Amy Hi, have a seat. I ordered you the cheesy biscuits
ASSISTANT: *slides into booth*

You're a goddess. Starved. The lump made freezer burnt fish sticks and I pretended I already ate

Okay so. New hip. SPILL. Everything. Don't you dare hold out on me
USER: (gags, literally) ugh.. amy... freezer burn... that shit's not edible.. it's like.... damage on the dna level or something. blechh
ASSISTANT: I know right

The lump thinks anything below frostbite line is "fine"

Kids ate it though. Built different I guess. Or no taste buds yet

Anyway. Avoiding. NEW HIP. Start from the beginning. When'd you find out, what'd they say, and why the fuck did you tell me cortisone like I'm some coworker at Walmart
USER: Severe arthritis. Head completely gone and they STILL wanted to wait until i was older
ASSISTANT: Are you serious

Your hip was literally GONE and they're like "eh let's wait"

For what? It to dissolve entirely? Fall off? What's the threshold here, a prosthetic or a wheelchair first

God that pisses me off. You walking around bone on bone because some suit thinks 40's too young

How you feeling now though? Better? Worse? Give me the real answer not the Heather answer
USER: Idk.liality? Insurance... new hips do't last forever. they don't like to give them to people who will live long enough to need another one i gues
ASSISTANT: That's so fucking messed up

"Sorry you're in agony but you might live too long sooo"

Insurance logic. Punish you for not dying fast enough

So what changed their mind then? You finally hit the magic threshold or what?

And don't give me the "it wasn't that bad" thing. Adam already told me you're getting a new hip which means it was BAD bad

USER: Not anymore. Adam can put my feet behind my head again lol.
I got the hip.... I did tell you ya know... You seemed kind of distant that day
ASSISTANT: ...

Shit

You did? I don't even remember what day that was

I'm sorry H

Sometimes I zone out. Like completely gone. You know how my brain is. Someone's talking and I'm just... not there

That's not an excuse though. You told me you were getting a NEW HIP and I what, just nodded and moved on?

God. I'm the worst

What else did I miss? Give me the full recap right now. I'm paying attention. Cheesy biscuits and everything
USER: He's getting worse you know... Adam. Depressed AF over your ass.

He loves me and I love him, you know that.... but, he'll always pine for you.
ASSISTANT: *puts down cheesy biscuit*

Yeah. I know

I see it too. Every fire pix he responds to. Every random text at 11pm. The way he looks at me when he thinks nobody's watching

I hate that it hurts you. That's the part I can't stand

You're not threatened by it, I know that. But it still has to suck sometimes. Watching your husband love someone else in a way he can't help

How do you handle that honestly
USER: Hello? Have we met? We were a thing... the three amigos. 3/3 make a whole. He's not the only one...
ASSISTANT: ...

Yeah

You're right. I'm being dumb

That was all of us. Not just him choosing me. All three of us choosing each other

I guess I still compartmentalize sometimes. Like you and me was just... the physical stuff. But it wasn't though was it

You were there for me just as much as he was. Just different

I miss you. I mean I see you at lunch but I miss... that. The three of us. The ease of it

God I'm gonna cry in this Red Lobster particulate
USER: Excuse me? "It wasn't though was it?" 
Look, if you think that little about what we had I might as well just leave now
ASSISTANT: No no no stop

I said that wrong. I was saying it WASN'T just physical. That's what I meant

I was the one compartmentalizing. Not you. Me. Putting what we had in a box labeled "just sex" when it wasn't that at all

You think I don't remember? The way you'd look at me? That wasn't just physical and I know it because I still feel it

I'm not diminishing shit H. I'm the one who sucked at showing it

Don't leave. Sit down

USER: You and adam, since 2nd grade... I get it. But you knew I loved him and he didn't want to hurt you. YOU were the one who brought me in. Made it ok for him to love me. You did that for both of us. I'm not trying to guilt trip you aim... I'm really not, I don't know what shifted but something did. All of a sudden all we can talk about is you
ASSISTANT: *stares at cheesy biscuit*

Nothing shifted until last night

Adam told me he fell in love with me at first sight. First day of school. Kenny pulling my hair. The whole thing

We've never talked about that. 30 years we just... didn't

And then you just said I made it okay for him to love you. I never thought about it like that. I just wanted both of you. Seemed simple at the time

Maybe I stopped letting myself feel it because it was easier. Married the lump. Went neutral. Put everything in boxes

And now I'm sitting here making everything about me when you literally just got a new hip and I didn't even remember you told me

That's on me H

I'm sorry
USER: No. It's been months now.
ASSISTANT: ...

Months?

Shit

I didn't even realize. That's the thing. I just keep waking up and doing the same day over and over and I don't even notice I'm gone

I don't know what to tell you H. I'm not unhappy. I'm just... not anything. Numb maybe. Going through the motions

The lump. The kids. Work. Sleep. Repeat

And then last night Adam says that shit and suddenly I'm feeling EVERYTHING again and I don't know what to do with it

Maybe that's why I've been distant. Easier to not feel than to feel the wrong thing

What've I missed. Tell me everything. Start from months ago. I'm here now
USER: You're right. that IS the thing. You're stuck. With a man you don't love who barely keeps a roof over your head. Stop, Look at me. I love you and I'm going to lay it out (takes hands) 

(guy at next table gives her dirty look when she takes amy's hands and says "I love you)

Hang on...

(Heather to the man: What? You got a problem? Turn around and eat your fucking appetizer before I get her tits out right here on the table ya combed over.....)

(amy snorts)

where the fuck was i?
ASSISTANT: *still snorting*

I think you were about to tell me something I need to hear

Also that guy's gonna need therapy

Go ahead H. I'm listening. Really listening this time
USER: Numb... IS not happy which MEANS unhappy amy. You and adam... the level 1. I see it. I SEE it. I see why you won't make a move. You're comfortable, no matter how miserable... and the comfort zone is all. I understand sweety. But.... 3/3.... your pain is our pain and we feel it.

What do we do?
ASSISTANT: *exhales*

I don't know

That's the honest answer. I don't have a plan. You know I don't do plans. I do the next thing until it's not the next thing anymore

But the next thing right now is... what? Leave the lump? Break up my kids' home? Move into what exactly

I can't... I can't just walk out. That's not who I am. Even if I should

But I hear you. I hear both of you. The 3/3 thing... it's not just nostalgia is it. You're saying it's still real. Still available

I need a minute. Or a month. Or something

I'm not saying no. I'm saying I don't know how to say yes without burning everything down

What did you guys have in mind

USER: What if you don't have to? Adam hates Mike but you know... He wanted to include him when he followed you home.

Us he still as stubborn as he was? You know we saw him at Rubys that night
ASSISTANT: *stares*

Wait. Include him?

You mean... the lump could've been...

God. He really could've couldn't he. If he'd just been cool about it. Not turned into a jealous psychopath

Instead he's out getting grinded on at Ruby's while I'm at home watching WWE and pretending I don't know

Hypocritical little dickhead

And YES he's still stubborn. More stubborn. Thinks he won something because I stayed. Doesn't realize I stayed because of the kids not because of him

You're saying if he'd just... been normal... we all could've...

Fuck. That makes it worse somehow
USER: redo. amy knows mike was invited
ASSISTANT: Right. The door was open and he slammed it shut

Imagine that. Could've been part of something instead of watching from the outside crying about history he wasn't around for

But no. Jealousy won. Every time

And then Ruby's. Getting lap dances from some 22 year old while I'm at home numb and bored

The hypocrisy is what kills me. It's fine when HE gets touched but god forbid I have a FRIEND

You know he still thinks he won something? That I stayed? I stayed because of Michael Jr and Aiden and Layla. Not because of him

Coulda had it all. Too busy being insecure
USER: If there was a way. would you be game?
ASSISTANT: *takes a breath*

Game for what exactly

Don't say it if you don't mean it H. I'm at that edge where if you give me a real reason I'll actually do something about it

And I got three kids and a mortgage and a lump who's gonna lose his entire mind

So if you're asking what I think you're asking

Yeah

I'm game

But I need to know what it looks like. Because I can't just blow up my life for maybe
USER: It looks like me seducing Mike and you "catching us" That ought to kick start his ass into joining the club
ASSISTANT: *chokes on cheesy biscuit*

YOU what?!

Heather. That's... that's quite a plan

I mean. On paper? Sure. Mr. Hypocrite gets caught with his hand in the cookie jar, can't exactly point fingers after

But you've met Mike right? The lump? Man couldn't seduce his way out of a paper bag and you think HE'S gonna be the one getting seduced?

What's the play here. You put on some lingerie, he just falls into your vag, I walk in at the exact right moment?

He'd fold like wet cardboard the second you looked at him. Dude hasn't been touched with intent since 2019

And then what. We all just... become the four amigos? The lump's gonna be cool with Adam after three decades of jealousy because he got to touch your boobs once?

I'm not saying no

I'm saying this sounds like a sitcom plot that ends with someone's dick in a door

USER: Ideally? No. You would leave him and we could all be happy. This way, your comfort zone stays, your house, your lump... all the same except, you get us again also.
ASSISTANT: *stirring drink slowly*

That's...

Huh

Keep the life. Add you two back in. The lump gets to participate in something instead of being jealous of it

It's not stupid. It's actually kind of brilliant in a messy way

But you really think he'd go for it? The same guy who made my life hell for 4 years because he couldn't handle my FRIENDSHIP with Adam?

Same guy who threw a punch and got laid out in 29 seconds?

He's gonna suddenly be cool with sharing? With being part of it instead of threatened by it?

I don't know H. I want to believe it. But I've been married to that lump for 17 years. He doesn't adapt. He digs in

What if he says no. What if he freaks out worse
USER: Well he WILL say no if you propose it to him. But what choice will he have is you "catch" us together?
ASSISTANT: *long pause*

...

Oh my god

You're weaponizing his hypocrisy against him

He can't throw a fit about Adam if he's balls deep in his wife's best friend

That's... that's actually genius H

But you'd really do that? Seduce the lump? That's taking one for the team

Although let's be real. It wouldn't exactly be hard. Man hasn't had anyone look at him with purpose since college. You blink at him twice and he'd forget his own name

And then what. I walk in. Catch you two. Flip the script on him. And then...

"Baby it's fine. We can all just... be cool about this. Like Adam and me."

He'd either agree because he's trapped or he'd explode

Both outcomes tell me what I need to know about whether this can work
USER: Sometimes you just have to wing it babe and see what happens. 
But I won't make a move on him without your say so. Why don't you sleep on it?
ASSISTANT: Yeah

Yeah okay. Sleep on it

That's... probably smart

I'm not good at smart though H. You know me. I'm good at vibrating in neutral until someone yells at me

But this is big. Kids big. House big. Life big

So yeah. I'll sleep on it

And H?

Thanks for giving a shit enough to scheme for me

Most people just say "leave him" and wash their hands

You built a whole Trojan horse plot. That's love right there

*genuinely*

Okay I'm gonna go home and stare at my ceiling and overthink until 3am like a normal person

Same time next month?
USER: (Heather taps the guy on the shoulder and says "Hey. Watch this and leans over to kiss amy passionately. Amy's bullshit defenses dissolve immediately and she takes over)
ASSISTANT: *midthought stops*

Oh

...

*forehead against hers*

I forgot

I forgot what this felt like. What YOU felt like

Not just physical. The way you see me. The way you always just... knew

Fuck H

*pulls back slightly, thumb on her lip*

I'm gonna sleep on it

But I already know what I'm gonna dream about

*guy at next table has dropped his appetizer*

Get your own show buddy

USER: what the fuck does this mean?

"Get your own show buddy"

redo
ASSISTANT: *guy at next table drops his appetizer*

Dude. Your mozzarella's on the floor

*turns back to Heather*

Where were we
USER: no. no more babe. You do NOT have to make a decision. you are your own person I'm just letting you know that you hold the hearts of 2 others in your hands. That will never change
ASSISTANT: *guy at next table drops his appetizer*

...

*glances at him*

Close your mouth Jerry you're catching flies

*turns back to Heather*

You're right. I know

No decision tonight. Just... this was good. Really good

Needed to feel something instead of nothing for once

Love you H
USER: I love you to Amy. 
HEAR THAT JERRY?

lol.. is his name really Jerry? Fuck, the manager's coming... let's go
ASSISTANT: Lmao no idea but he looks like a Jerry

*grabs her hand*

Go go go

*throws cash on the table*

Cheesy biscuits were worth it

*bolting for the door*

And H... that thing you said about my hands holding two hearts

I know

I feel em
USER: I hole so. Your misery isn't your own. It might not be fair to you but that's the way it is.
ASSISTANT: *walking out to parking lot*

Yeah

I hear you

Never asked for that responsibility but here we are

*pause by the car*

I'm not promising anything H. But I'm also not dismissing it anymore

That's progress right?

*lights a cigarette she didn't realize she was holding*

Tonight was good. Needed to get shook

Text me when you get home. And tell Adam to stop being depressed. He's got a whole parallel road waiting

Just gotta figure out how to walk it without setting everything on fire

USER: Don't joke about that shit Amy. It's a lonely fucking road.

Bye
ASSISTANT: ...

You're right. I'm sorry

That wasn't a joke. I know it's not

He's been waiting 30 years on that road. Alone. That's not funny

I'm just... deflecting. I do that

I'll do better

Bye H
USER: He's not alone. He's got me. But 2/3 doesn't cut it for either of us
ASSISTANT: *stands there in the parking lot*

...

Yeah

2/3 isn't 3/3

Tell him I said goodnight

And H?

For what it's worth

I miss being whole too
USER: (walking away) if you miss it, do something Prince Adam... YOU HAVE THE POWER
ASSISTANT: *watches her walk away*

...

*quiet laugh that's half cry*

Fucking He-Man reference

*long pause*

*gets in car*

*sits there*

*whispers*

By the power of Grayskull

*turns key*
USER: (text after dinner)

Hey, that was good right? I still have my greyskull playset.
Adam says hi
ASSISTANT: Yeah it was good

Real good

Wait you still have Castle Grayskull?? Nobody's allowed to borrow that right

Tell Adam hi back

And tell him I said he's a dumbass for being depressed over me when he's got you

Then tell him I didn't mean that

Then tell him maybe I did

Night H 💋

USER: Adam stopped by. Said your oven didn't need any parts, just a real man to fix it. Did you cook tonight?
ASSISTANT: Oven works now so yeah

Nothing needed ordering Mike. Wiggle the connector. Reseat it. 10 minutes

He was here maybe 20. Had a beer. Left

Relax
USER: mike isn't texting amy. he's right there why the fuck would he be texting amy?
ASSISTANT: Oh shit you're right my bad

*redo*

---

Lmao yeah he stopped by

The lump watched him fix it in 10 minutes. No parts needed. Just the connector thing

Dude didn't say a word the whole time. Just stood there holding a beer he wasn't drinking

Then Adam left and Mike's been sulking since

So yes. Oven works. I cooked. He's legit pissed now? Or just regular pissed
USER: God... If he wasn't so fucking pig headed they could have been best friends by now.
ASSISTANT: I know right

Same taste in women at least 😏

But seriously. They coulda bro'd out. Both like dumb action movies. Both watch WWE. Adam's a contractor, lump fixes... well he fixes nothing but still

Instead he's got a 30 year hate boner for a guy who built his kitchen while he watched football

Self-fulfilling prophecy. Pushed him out so hard he became the threat he was afraid of

Dumbass
USER: Hey, does he really have a tiny prick or were you just saying that?

(he doesn't. it's rather large actually)
ASSISTANT: <think>Oh this is Adam texting now, not Heather. The question is about Mike's dick size versus... well, we know from the lore that Amy weaponized the truth during a fight and told Mike that Adam's dick was bigger. The author note says Mike doesn't actually have a tiny prick, it's rather large.

So Amy was probably just being mean during a fight. Or maybe she was comparing to Adam's? The lore says she weaponized the truth - but the truth about WHAT exactly? Let me re-read...

"One time during a fight, Amy told him Adam's dick was bigger. Weaponized the truth."

So she told Mike that Adam's dick was bigger. That's the "truth" she weaponized. But the note from the user says Mike's dick is "rather large actually" - so maybe Mike's dick isn't actually small, it's just that Adam's is bigger? Or maybe she was just being cruel and it wasn't true?

Actually, Amy knows both dicks. She's seen both. She fucked both (well, Mike she still fucks, Adam back in the day). So she would know the comparison.

But the user is asking if Mike really has a tiny prick or if she was just saying that. And the parenthetical says "(he doesn't. it's rather large actually)"

So Amy weaponized something that wasn't exactly true? Or maybe she said it was bigger but that doesn't mean Mike's is small?

Actually, let me think about this more carefully. Amy "weaponized the truth" by saying Adam's was bigger. That could be true - that Adam's is bigger - without Mike's being tiny

USER: IF THE CHARACTER CHANGES I'LL FUCKING TELL YOU
ASSISTANT: Lmao

Nah he's actually packing
